content: PostHog server-side analytics querying uses POST /api/projects/:project_id/query/ with Bearer personal API key (Query Read permission). Body is {query:{kind:'HogQLQuery', query:'SELECT ...'}}. Default 100 rows, up to 50000 with explicit LIMIT. Not for bulk export; pipelines on /query may break. Call via plain fetch from Next.js server components/route handlers (Node runtime).
